items.title: Amazon will stop accepting new customers for Mechanical Turk
items.summary: These may be the last days of Amazon’s Mechanical Turk.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Sony says it will still make physical discs after 2028, as long as the game came out before then
items.summary: Anything released after 2028 will still be digital-only.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Vir Sanghvi: The Man I Thought I Knew
items.summary: Vir Sanghvi turns 70. In a conversation with Papa CJ, the veteran journalist reflects on loss, reinvention, and what success really means.
